title: AI Engineer (Contract)
company_focus: AI safety and threat intelligence platform
description:
About 10a Labs: 10a Labs is the safety and threat-
intelligence layer trusted by frontier AI labs, AI unicorns,
Fortune 10 companies, and leading global technology
platforms. Our adversarial red teaming, model evaluations,
and intelligence collection enable engineering, safety, and
security teams to stay ahead of evolving threats and deploy
AI systems safely.

About the role: 10a Labs is seeking an AI Engineer for a
four-month contract (potential to extend) to partner closely
with engineers and internal teams to design and implement
cutting-edge AI solutions. You’ll build practical systems
that leverage modern language models that will be applied to
real-world problems.

This role blends applied AI expertise, strong engineering
fundamentals, and creative problem-solving. You’ll prototype
quickly, iterate rapidly, and translate emerging model
capabilities into reliable, production-ready systems.

In this role, you will:

- Design and implement AI-driven systems using AI APIs in
  creative and smart ways.
- Build prototypes and production workflows that leverage
  language models for tasks such as classification,
  evaluation, and synthetic data generation.
- Integrate AI APIs, vector stores, and supporting
  infrastructure to enable scalable applications.
- Experiment with and evaluate both hosted and open-source
  models where appropriate.
- Partner with product managers, analysts, and technical
  writers to translate complex systems into well-defined
  requirements and clear external materials.
- Provide technical feedback to product and engineering teams
  to improve system quality and performance.

We’re looking for someone who:

- Has experience in AI engineering, software engineering, or
  applied ML roles.
- Is highly comfortable using modern coding copilots and
  model-assisted development tools (e.g., Claude Code,
  Codex, or similar).
- Has hands-on experience working with model provider APIs.
- Is scrappy, creative, and able to iterate quickly in
  ambiguous problem spaces.
- Operates with autonomy and strong problem-solving skills,
  managing multiple projects simultaneously.
- Is collaborative, detail-oriented, and thrives in fast-
  moving, high-impact environments.
- Has experience with end-to-end ownership of complex
  technical challenges.

Requirements:

- At least 1+ year experience in AI engineering or research,
  or 3-5 years of experience in software engineering or
  similar roles.
- Strong applied AI experience, including working knowledge of
  AI systems and AI APIs or open-source models.
- Experience with vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate,
  FAISS, Milvus) and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
  architectures.
responsibilities: Design and implement AI-driven systems using AI APIs in creative and smart ways
Build prototypes and production workflows that leverage language models for tasks such as classification, evaluation, and synthetic data generation
Integrate AI APIs, vector stores, and supporting infrastructure to enable scalable applications
Experiment with and evaluate both hosted and open-source models where appropriate
Partner with product managers, analysts, and technical writers to translate complex systems into well-defined requirements and clear external materials
Provide technical feedback to product and engineering teams to improve system quality and performance
use_cases: AI system safety evaluations and red teaming
Synthetic data generation for AI testing
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves hands-on building of AI-driven systems
using language models, implementing RAG architectures, and
integrating AI APIs for real-world applications. The
engineer will work directly on prototyping and production
workflows that leverage LLMs for classification, evaluation,
and synthetic data generation.
